div.style: min-height:100vh; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background: rgba(14, 21, 16, 0.97);

img.style: display:none; width:100%; height:200px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:10px; margin-bottom:10px;

div.style: height:100vh; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:black;

button.style: margin-top:15px; padding:10px 20px; border:none; border-radius:8px; background:#6366f1; color:white;
